use_cases: Hero section background with animated celestial bloom effect for landing pages
Decorative animated backdrop for creative portfolios and agency websites
Visual loading or transition element with cosmic bloom animation
Ambient background component for entertainment or media applications
ai_summary: A Three.js WebGL shader component that renders an animated celestial bloom effect with nebula-like gradients, star particles, and organic petal distortion using fractal Brownian motion. This decorative background component continuously animates in real-time with deep space purples and cosmic colors, making it ideal for hero sections, landing pages, or creative portfolio backdrops.
